transcript.text: Namaste, my name is Rupa Devi, calling from the I-C-C-C, Uttar Pradesh. Welcome to Gyarah Das. We are here to support mothers through pregnancy until the child turns two. May I kindly ask if I can take a few details to support you and connect you with health and nutrition services?
Of course, thank you for letting me know. You’re welcome to call back anytime. Take care.
Chris, hello. I'll give you a call.
